---
title: "Negative Binomial Regression: `r params$target_drug` vs. `r params$comparator_group` — `r params$dep_var`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
params:
  result_file:      ""
  target_drug:      "Semaglutide"
  comparator_group: "Insulins"
  dep_var:          "n_psych_days"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
source("helper_functions.R")

load(params$result_file)   # restores nb_result
r <- nb_result
```

**Cohort:** `r r$study_cohort_label`
**Outcome:** `r r$dep_var`
**Period:** `r r$period_name`
**Covariates:** `r paste(r$covariates, collapse = ", ")`

---

## Sample Size

```{r sample-size}
r$dataset %>%
  count(treatment_name) %>%
  rename(Group = treatment_name, N = n) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

---

## Primary Analysis

### Poisson — Overdispersion Check

```{r poisson-check}
check_poisson(r$m_pois)
```

### Negative Binomial Model

```{r nb-model}
check_od(r$m1)
check_mc(r$m1)
interpret_nb(r$m1, term = "treatment",
             outcome    = r$dep_var,
             comparison = r$comparator_group)
```

```{r nb-table, results='asis'}
tab <- tab_model(r$m1)
cat(tab$knitr)
```

```{r nb-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
plot_model(r$m1) + theme_minimal(base_size = 20)
```

---

## Outcome Distribution

```{r dist-setup}
ds <- r$dataset %>%
  mutate(treatment_name = factor(treatment_name,
                                 levels = c(r$target_drug, r$comparator_group)))

n0 <- ds %>% filter(!!sym(r$dep_var) == 0) %>% nrow()
nt <- ds %>% nrow()
subtitle_base <- paste0(r$study_cohort_label, " | ", r$period_name,
                        " | n0 = ", comma(n0), "/", comma(nt),
                        " (", percent(n0 / nt), ")")

my_range <- if (startsWith(r$dep_var, "n_med")) 1 else 10
my_min   <- 1

ds_cut <- ds %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(value_cut = my_cut(!!sym(r$dep_var), my_range, my_min)) %>%
  ungroup()

cut_levels <- ds_cut %>%
  arrange(!!sym(r$dep_var)) %>%
  pull(value_cut) %>%
  unique()

ds_cut <- ds_cut %>%
  mutate(value_cut = factor(value_cut, levels = cut_levels))
```

### Count Distribution

```{r dist-count, fig.width=20, fig.height=8}
ds_count <- ds_cut %>%
  count(value_cut, treatment_name)

y_max <- max(ds_count$n, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1

ggplot(ds_count, aes(x = value_cut, y = n,
                     fill = treatment_name, color = treatment_name)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(n)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            vjust = -0.5, colour = "black", size = 5) +
  labs(title    = r$study_cohort_label,
       subtitle = subtitle_base,
       x        = r$dep_var,
       y        = "Count") +
  ylim(0, y_max) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20)
```

### Percentage Distribution

```{r dist-percent, fig.width=20, fig.height=8}
ds_pct <- ds_cut %>%
  count(value_cut, treatment_name) %>%
  group_by(treatment_name) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

y_max_pct <- max(ds_pct$pct, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1

ggplot(ds_pct, aes(x = value_cut, y = pct,
                   fill = treatment_name, color = treatment_name)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(pct)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            vjust = -0.5, colour = "black", size = 5) +
  labs(title    = r$study_cohort_label,
       subtitle = subtitle_base,
       x        = r$dep_var,
       y        = "Proportion") +
  ylim(0, y_max_pct) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20)
```

### Density Plot

```{r dist-density, fig.width=20, fig.height=8}
ggplot(ds, aes(x = !!sym(r$dep_var),
               fill = treatment_name, color = treatment_name)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title    = r$study_cohort_label,
       subtitle = subtitle_base,
       x        = r$dep_var,
       y        = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20)
```
